channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Nine Inch Nails @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-03-16 03:00 — Nine Inch Nails at Chase Center. Nine Inch Nails is a legendary act with a strong live reputation, making this a must-see event.

item.title: Excision @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-03-14 02:00 → 2026-03-15 02:00 — Excision at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Excision is known for high-energy electronic shows, making this a standout event for fans of the genre.

item.title: Whitney @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-13 03:00 — Whitney at The Fillmore. Whitney's blend of indie rock and folk is highly praised, promising an engaging live performance.

item.title: ALO @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-15 03:00 — ALO at The Fillmore. ALO brings a unique sound and a strong live presence, appealing to fans of jam and indie music.

item.title: Grahame Lesh @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-21 03:00 — Grahame Lesh at The Fillmore. Unbroken Chain celebrates Phil Lesh's legacy, attracting fans of the Grateful Dead and jam band culture.

item.title: Jeff Tweedy @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-26 03:00 — Jeff Tweedy at The Fillmore. Jeff Tweedy's solo performance is a highlight for fans of Americana and indie rock.

item.title: yung kai @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-17 03:00 — yung kai at August Hall. Lauren Spencer Smith's rising star status makes her show a noteworthy event for pop music enthusiasts.

item.title: Maggie Lindemann @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-21 03:00 — Maggie Lindemann at August Hall. Maggie Lindemann is gaining traction in the pop scene, making her show a promising event.

item.title: Nothing @ The Regency Ballroom
item.description: 2026-03-20 02:00 — Nothing at The Regency Ballroom. Nothing's atmospheric sound and strong live reputation make this a compelling show for alternative music fans.

item.title: Colony House @ Great American Music Hall
item.description: 2026-03-16 03:00 — Colony House at Great American Music Hall. Colony House's indie rock sound is well-received, promising an engaging live experience.

item.title: Dirty Three @ Great American Music Hall
item.description: 2026-03-24 03:00 — Dirty Three at Great American Music Hall. Dirty Three's unique instrumental sound offers a captivating live performance for fans of experimental music.

item.title: My Life with the Thrill Kill Kult @ Great American Music Hall
item.description: 2026-03-26 02:00 — My Life with the Thrill Kill Kult at Great American Music Hall. Johnny Marr's legacy as a guitarist and songwriter makes his show a significant event for fans of rock music.

item.title: Bad Omens @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-03-28 02:00 — Bad Omens at Oakland Arena. BAD OMENS is gaining popularity in the rock scene, making their tour a noteworthy event.

item.title: redveil @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-03-19 03:00 — redveil at August Hall. Calum Scott's emotional pop ballads are well-received, making his performance a highlight for fans.

item.title: Sam Smith @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-03-11 03:00 → 2026-03-12 03:00 — Sam Smith at The Castro Theatre. Sam Smith's powerful vocals and stage presence make this a highly anticipated show.

item.title: Lauren Spencer Smith @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-03-19 03:00 — Lauren Spencer Smith at The Fillmore.
